name: LAF Agent Safety — Source Registry
policy: original summaries; no third-party source vendored

sources.title: LocalAIFactory SafeToolGateway — default-deny command classification and four-tier risk model
Path sandbox guard — worktree confinement, absolute-escape and dot-dot traversal blocking
IsolatedPatchRunner — snapshot, apply-in-worktree, build-and-test, rollback-on-failure with no commit/push capability
Decision logging and experience capture for both safe and forbidden tool calls
